title: xyris uleana
intro: Xyris uleana, also known as Ulean's yellow-eyed grass, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Xyridaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Xyris uleana include relief from congestion, fever reduction, and soothing of sore throats. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
